title: UX Designer (NODTS)
description:
[1 year contract, renewable]


We are developing the National Organ Donation and Transplantation System (NODTS). This system will provide NOTU with a seamless, efficient, and error-free platform to manage critical steps of the time-sensitive organ transplant process. Key functionalities include assessing the suitability of deceased donor organs and matching donor kidneys to recipients.


Responsibilities

● Drive end-to-end design initiatives, from initial concept through to final delivery.

● Collaborate with cross-functional teams (product managers, UX designers, engineers, and QA) to ensure designs are not only user-centered and high-quality but also technically feasible, advocating for UX best practices at every stage.

● Conduct usability testing to gather insights and feedback for iterative design improvements.

● Create user flows, wireframes and prototypes to communicate design concepts and interactions effectively.

● Ensure design consistency across pages and flows, balancing aesthetic appeal with usability.

● Communicate design rationale and decisions effectively to internal and external stakeholders and solicit feedback for refinement.


Requirements

● 7 of experience as a UX Designer, with a strong portfolio showcasing your design process, problem-solving abilities, and successful project outcomes.

● Demonstrated ability in information architecture, interaction design, and responsive design, encompassing a deep understanding of user flows, wireframing, and prototyping. Visual design skills are a plus, but not the primary focus.

● Ability to translate complex / ambiguous requirements into intuitive and user-friendly interfaces.

● Experience conducting usability testing to inform design decisions.

● Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, startup environment, where quick decision-making and adaptability are crucial.

● Excellent collaboration and communication skills, with proven ability to work with cross-functional teams to develop innovative solutions.

● Proficiency in UX design tools (e.g., Figma, Sketch, Adobe XD).


What We Value

● Passion for public good: a genuine interest for working on projects that benefit the public.

● Initiative: the ability to take initiative, work autonomously, and proactively identify issues and opportunities for improvement.

● Team collaboration & transparency: A commitment to sharing knowledge and contributing to a healthy, transparent team culture.

● Continuous Learning: A dedication to staying current with the latest technologies, UX trends, and best practices.

postedCompany.description:
We are an award-winning, full-service Web Solutions Company based in Singapore. Websparks Pte Ltd is formed in 2008.


Each of our Websparkers should be Curious, Collaborative, Committed, and a Challenger. We wake up daily to deliver extraordinary digital experiences to our customers.


Websparks is an ISO 27001 certified company. ISO/IEC 27001 is the leading international standard for information security management and helps organizations to keep information assets secure. Websparks is an ISO 9001:2015 certified company. We have demonstrated to external auditors our commitment to quality. We are able to consistently provide products and services that meet our client’s requirements.


Websparks is named as APN Select Consulting Partner as a result of our investment in technical resource development aimed at ensuring efficient usage of the AWS cloud. Websparks is certified as a Microsoft Gold Application Development, Silver Application Integration and DevOps Partner. We are equipped with the tools and resources to deliver the best quality of software.


Websparks is a Progress Gold Partner. As a Progress partner, we play a key role in helping organizations of all sizes – across all industries – transform and run their businesses. Websparks is a Sitecore Solution Partner.  Solution partners bring their customers' unique visions to dynamic life on their websites with the Sitecore Experience Platform.
postedCompany.name: WEBSPARKS PTE. LTD.
